name: Leverage Shares -1x Short Citigroup ETP
summary: Leverage Shares -1x Short Citigroup ETP is an exchange-traded product (ETP) that provides -1x (inverse) leveraged exposure to Citigroup stock. It is designed for investors seeking to profit from a decline in the value of Citigroup shares. The ETP is issued by Leverage Shares Public Limited, based in the United Kingdom.
